9996.description: Sable Belia was first described as average height, heavyset, silver streaked hair, dark eyes, with alert bearing.

9997.description: Bram Cormere the 2nd was first described as average height, broad shouldered, silver streaked hair, gray eyes, with somber bearing.

9998.description: Vesna Valfield was first described as average height, sturdy, brown hair, amber eyes, with restless bearing.

9999.description: Vesna Ulfell was first described as average height, heavyset, black hair, blue eyes, with bold bearing.
